'''âk-z-l-k''' ('''kakazlekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:finalize|finalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:finalize|finalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-z-l-k
|-
! Lemma
| kakazlekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikazlekoko|thikazlekoko]] || [[word:jikazlekoko|jikazlekoko]] || [[word:shikazlekoko|shikazlekoko]] || [[word:kikazlekoko|kikazlekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukazlekoko|thuthukazlekoko]] || [[word:jujukazlekoko|jujukazlekoko]] || [[word:shushukazlekoko|shushukazlekoko]] || [[word:kukukazlekoko|kukukazlekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukazlekoko|thukazlekoko]] || [[word:jukazlekoko|jukazlekoko]] || [[word:shukazlekoko|shukazlekoko]] || [[word:kukazlekoko|kukazlekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukazlekoko|thukazlekoko]] || [[word:jukazlekoko|jukazlekoko]] || [[word:shukazlekoko|shukazlekoko]] || [[word:kukazlekoko|kukazlekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekazlekoko|thekazlekoko]] || [[word:jekazlekoko|jekazlekoko]] || [[word:shekazlekoko|shekazlekoko]] || [[word:kekazlekoko|kekazlekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokazlekoko|thothokazlekoko]] || [[word:jojokazlekoko|jojokazlekoko]] || [[word:shoshokazlekoko|shoshokazlekoko]] || [[word:kokokazlekoko|kokokazlekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokazlekoko|thokazlekoko]] || [[word:jokazlekoko|jokazlekoko]] || [[word:shokazlekoko|shokazlekoko]] || [[word:kokazlekoko|kokazlekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokazlekoko|thokazlekoko]] || [[word:jokazlekoko|jokazlekoko]] || [[word:shokazlekoko|shokazlekoko]] || [[word:kokazlekoko|kokazlekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkazlekoko|thĂŠkazlekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkazlekoko|jĂŠkazlekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkazlekoko|shĂŠkazlekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkazlekoko|kĂŠkazlekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakazlekoko|thathakazlekoko]] || [[word:jajakazlekoko|jajakazlekoko]] || [[word:shashakazlekoko|shashakazlekoko]] || [[word:kakakazlekoko|kakakazlekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakazlekoko|thakazlekoko]] || [[word:jakazlekoko|jakazlekoko]] || [[word:shakazlekoko|shakazlekoko]] || [[word:kakazlekoko|kakazlekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakazlekoko|thakazlekoko]] || [[word:jakazlekoko|jakazlekoko]] || [[word:shakazlekoko|shakazlekoko]] || [[word:kakazlekoko|kakazlekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakazlekithi|shakazlekithi]] || [[word:shakazlekiji|shakazlekiji]] || [[word:shakazlekishi|shakazlekishi]] || [[word:shakazlekiki|shakazlekiki]]
